overview_table_fields.description: University / institute name
overview_table_fields.formula: TRIM(COALESCE(u.institute_name, ''))
overview_table_fields.null_handling: Exclude rows where institute_name is blank

overview_table_fields.description: Mode of program delivery (e.g. OFFLINE, ONLINE)
overview_table_fields.formula: u.delivery_mode
overview_table_fields.null_handling: NULL shown as blank

overview_table_fields.description: Semester start date for the university
overview_table_fields.formula: MIN(u.semester_start_date)
overview_table_fields.null_handling: NULL shown as blank

overview_table_fields.description: Semester end date for the university
overview_table_fields.formula: MAX(u.semester_end_date)
overview_table_fields.null_handling: NULL shown as blank

overview_table_fields.description: Total delivery capacity for the university in the semester
overview_table_fields.formula: SUM(net_niat_executional_slots) aggregated per institute across all subjects
overview_table_fields.null_handling: NULL treated as 0

overview_table_fields.description: Total planned unique session slots across all subjects in the semester
overview_table_fields.formula: COUNT DISTINCT session_id across all subjects for the institute and semester
overview_table_fields.null_handling: NULL treated as 0

overview_table_fields.description: Pro-rated planned content slots from semester start up to today
overview_table_fields.formula: calculate_expected_slots_to_date(start_date, end_date, planned_content_slots): counts weekdays from start_date to min(today, end_date), divides by total semester weekdays, multiplies by planned_content_slots
overview_table_fields.null_handling: Returns 0 if start_date is None or total_slots is 0

overview_table_fields.description: Number of planned slots actually delivered up to today
overview_table_fields.formula: SUM(sessions_delivered_count) per institute, filtered to batch and semester
overview_table_fields.null_handling: NULL treated as 0

overview_table_fields.description: Signed percentage deviation of actual delivery vs planned content pace. Negative = behind schedule.
overview_table_fields.formula: ((Planned slots delivered till date - Planned content slots till date) / Planned content slots till date) * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: Returns None (shown as N/A) when Planned content slots till date is 0 or None

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of enrolled students who attempted at least one classroom quiz
overview_table_fields.formula: (COUNT DISTINCT users with derived_unit_type='CLASSROOM_QUIZ' / total_students) * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when total_students = 0

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of classroom quiz attempts with best attempt score >= 80
overview_table_fields.formula: (COUNT DISTINCT user_id+quiz_id pairs where derived_unit_type='CLASSROOM_QUIZ' AND best_attempt_percentage_score >= 80 / COUNT DISTINCT user_id+quiz_id pairs where derived_unit_type='CLASSROOM_QUIZ') * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when no classroom quiz attempts

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of planned lecture sessions delivered/completed
overview_table_fields.formula: COUNT DISTINCT session_id where session_type='Lecture' and session_status in completed/delivered/conducted / COUNT DISTINCT session_id where session_type='Lecture' * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when planned lecture sessions = 0

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of planned practice sessions that were delivered
overview_table_fields.formula: COUNT DISTINCT session_id where session_type='Practice' and session_status in completed/delivered/conducted / COUNT DISTINCT session_id where session_type='Practice' * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when planned practice sessions = 0

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of planned exam sessions delivered/completed
overview_table_fields.formula: COUNT DISTINCT session_id where session_type='Exam' and session_status in completed/delivered/conducted / COUNT DISTINCT session_id where session_type='Exam' * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when planned exam sessions = 0

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of available practice sessions completed by users
overview_table_fields.formula: COUNT DISTINCT completed user_id||unit_id pairs where unit_type='PRACTICE' / (total_students * COUNT DISTINCT practice unit_id) * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when total_students = 0

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of planned module quiz sessions that were conducted
overview_table_fields.formula: (SUM of MAX(delivered) where session_type='EXAM' AND LOWER(session_name_enum) matches REGEXP \bmodule\b OR \bcourse[\s_-]+quiz\b / SUM of MAX(planned) for same filter) * 100 — matches 'module quiz', 'module exam', 'module 1', 'course quiz', etc.
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; MAX() per group before SUM() because columns are cumulative

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of enrolled students who attempted at least one module quiz (MODULE_QUIZ or COURSE_QUIZ)
overview_table_fields.formula: (COUNT DISTINCT users where derived_unit_type IN ('MODULE_QUIZ','COURSE_QUIZ') / total_students) * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when total_students = 0

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of module/course quiz attempts with best attempt score >= 80
overview_table_fields.formula: (COUNT DISTINCT user_id+quiz_id pairs where derived_unit_type IN ('MODULE_QUIZ','COURSE_QUIZ') AND best_attempt_percentage_score >= 80 / COUNT DISTINCT user_id+quiz_id pairs where derived_unit_type IN ('MODULE_QUIZ','COURSE_QUIZ')) * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when no module quiz attempts

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of planned skill assessment sessions that were conducted
overview_table_fields.formula: (SUM of MAX(delivered) where session_type='EXAM' AND LOWER(session_name_enum) contains 'skill' / SUM of MAX(planned) for same filter) * 100 — uses session_adherence actual planned vs delivered counts
overview_table_fields.null_handling: Returns NULL when no skill assessment sessions are planned in session_adherence

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of enrolled students who participated in at least one skill assessment
overview_table_fields.formula: AVG across sections of (COUNT DISTINCT users where assessment_type='SKILL_ASSESSMENT' / total_students) * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; MOCK variants excluded by filtering assessment_type exactly to 'SKILL_ASSESSMENT'

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of students who attempted skill assessments and passed (section_evaluation_result = 'PASSED')
overview_table_fields.formula: (COUNT DISTINCT user_id+assessment_id pairs where assessment_type='SKILL_ASSESSMENT' AND section_evaluation_result contains PASS / COUNT DISTINCT user_id+assessment_id pairs where assessment_type='SKILL_ASSESSMENT') * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; returns NULL when no skill assessment attempts

overview_table_fields.description: Percentage of students who attempted graded/academic assessments and passed (section_evaluation_result = 'PASSED')
overview_table_fields.formula: AVG across sections of (COUNT DISTINCT users where assessment_type='GRADED_ASSESSMENT' AND section_evaluation_result='PASSED' / COUNT DISTINCT users who attempted graded assessment) * 100
overview_table_fields.null_handling: SAFE_DIVIDE used; MOCK_GRADED_ASSESSMENT excluded by exact match on 'GRADED_ASSESSMENT'

source_tables.role: Roster / enrollment — provides total students per institute+section, plus semester dates
Session delivery counts — actual slots delivered per institute
Semester course catalogue — provides subject names (sem_course_title) and total planned slots (net_niat_executional_slots) per subject
source_tables.notes: Use sem_course_title for subject display names. net_niat_executional_slots = total slots for the full semester.

source_tables.role: Week-wise session adherence — planned vs delivered counts for each session type/name combination
source_tables.notes: total_sessions_planned and total_sessions_delivered are CUMULATIVE per row. Always MAX() per group before SUM() across groups to avoid double-counting.

source_tables.role: Quiz attempt records — one row per user per quiz, with type and best attempt result
source_tables.notes: derived_unit_type values: CLASSROOM_QUIZ (classroom quiz), MODULE_QUIZ / COURSE_QUIZ (treated as module quiz in overview metrics), DAILY_QUIZ (available in drilldowns but excluded from module quiz overview metrics). best_attempt_evaluation_result = 'PASS' or 'FAIL'.

source_tables.role: Unit completion records — tracks whether each user completed each unlocked unit
source_tables.notes: unit_type = 'PRACTICE' for practice units. unit_completion_status = 'COMPLETED' for completed units.

source_tables.role: Skill and graded assessment scores — tracks participation and pass/fail per assessment
source_tables.notes: assessment_type values: 'SKILL_ASSESSMENT' (skill assessments), 'GRADED_ASSESSMENT' (academic/graded assessments). Exclude MOCK variants by exact match. section_evaluation_result = 'PASSED' or 'FAILED'.

deviation_formula.description: Signed deviation percentage. Negative means behind schedule.
deviation_formula.formula: ((Planned slots delivered till date - Planned content slots till date) / Planned content slots till date) * 100
deviation_formula.null_condition: Planned content slots till date = 0 or NULL

pacing_formula.description: Pro-rated planned content slots to today based on weekday count
pacing_formula.clamped: today is clamped to min(today, end_date) so value never exceeds total_slots
